title: Multi-step checkout flow (guest checkout, auto-registration, confirmation)
description: Contact → Shipping → Payment → Confirm checkout with Indonesia-specific address fields, guest checkout without prior registration, auto-registration of a customer account on order completion, order summary review, and confirmation page.

inScope: Multi-step checkout: Contact → Shipping → Payment → Confirm
Indonesia-specific shipping address fields (province, city, postal code)
Auto-registration of a customer account on order completion using collected contact/shipping data, with duplicate-email lookup/linking
Order confirmation page with order details

acceptanceCriteria.text: A guest can complete checkout without registering beforehand
Shipping form validates Indonesia-specific fields (province, city, postal code)
On order completion, a customer account is auto-created from the checkout contact data
If the guest's email already has an account, the order links to that existing account instead of creating a duplicate
Customer sees an order confirmation page with order details after checkout
